title: Spicy Algerian Skirt Steak Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy Algerian-inspired dish featuring skirt steak and vegetables, served as kebabs. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.

ingredients.name: Flaky Pastry or Pita Bread (for serving)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together harissa sauce, lemon juice, and olive oil.
Add the skirt steak to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated steak, red onion, red bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the steak reaches 130°F for medium-rare.
Serve the kebabs hot with flaky pastry or pita bread on the side.
Optional: garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro.
